zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de BEAUMONT於大約1235年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特波奧蒙吉素-薩特時，她的父親Raoul de BEAUMONT65歲，母親Agnès Émeline de La FLÈCHE52歲。她於1253年2月12日與Louis de BRIENNE在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1301年5月9日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特米雷--哈尼享年67歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特米雷--哈尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de BEAUMONT于大约1235年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特波奧蒙吉素-薩特时，她的父亲Raoul de BEAUMONT65岁，母亲Agnès Émeline de La FLÈCHE52岁。她于1253年2月12日与Louis de BRIENNE在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1301年5月9日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特米雷--哈尼享年67岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特米雷--哈尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BEAUMONT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de BEAUMONT was born about 1235, in Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Raoul de BEAUMONT, was 65 and her mother, Agnès Émeline de La FLÈCHE, was 52. She married Louis de BRIENNE on 12 February 1253, in Acre, Northern, Israel. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 9 May 1301, in Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 67, and was buried in Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de BEAUMONT est née environ 1235, à Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Raoul de BEAUMONT, avait 65 ans et sa mère, Agnès Émeline de La FLÈCHE, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Louis de BRIENNE le 12 février 1253, à Acre, Northern, Israël. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1301, à Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de BEAUMONT um 1235 in Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul de BEAUMONT 65 und ihre Mutter Agnès Émeline de La FLÈCHE 52. Sie hat am 12. Februar 1253 in Acre, Northern, Israel Louis de BRIENNE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1301 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de BEAUMONT è nata il circa 1235 nel Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Raoul de BEAUMONT, aveva 65 anni e sua madre, Agnès Émeline de La FLÈCHE, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato Louis de BRIENNE il 12 febbraio 1253, nel Acre, Northern, Israele. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 9 maggio 1301, nel Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de BEAUMONTが約1235年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスビーウモント-スル-サルスで生まれた時，父Raoul de BEAUMONTは65歳，母Agnès Émeline de La FLÈCHEは52歳であった。1253年2月12日にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹでLouis de BRIENNEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1301年5月9日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスケミールe-エン-チャーニーで67歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスケミールe-エン-チャーニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 보몽-수-사르테
ko.Chemire-en-Charnie, Departement de la Sa: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 체미e--처니
ko.Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la L: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 체미e--처니
ko.Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Mamers, Sarthe, Pay: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 맘르스 보몽-수-사르테
ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de BEAUMONT(이)가 대략 1235년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 보몽-수-사르테에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul de BEAUMONT(은)는 65세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès Émeline de La FLÈCHE(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 1253년 2월 12일 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에서 Louis de BRIENNE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 5월 9일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 체미e--처니에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 체미e--처니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de BEAUMONT nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Raoul de BEAUMONT, tinha 65 anos e sua mãe, Agnès Émeline de La FLÈCHE, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com Louis de BRIENNE em 12 de fevereiro de 1253, em Acre, Northern, Israel. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de maio de 1301, em Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Mamers, Sarthe, Pay: бомонт-сур-сарт, мамирс, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de BEAUMONT родилась около 1235 г. в местности бомонт-сур-сарт, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul de BEAUMONT было 65 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès Émeline de La FLÈCHE, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis de BRIENNE 12 февраля 1253 г. в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 9 мая 1301 г. в местности чемирe-ен-чарни, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности чемирe-ен-чарни, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de BEAUMONT nació aproximadamente 1235, en Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Raoul de BEAUMONT, tenía 65 años y su mamá, Agnès Émeline de La FLÈCHE, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Louis de BRIENNE el 12 de febrero de 1253, en Acre, Northern, Israel. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1301, en Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
